title: TG CPGET 2026 Notification

detail.title: TG CPGET 2026 Notification
detail.short_info: TG CPGET 2026 Notification released. Online registration started on 15 May 2026. Check important dates, application fee, exam pattern, eligibility and direct link for Telangana PG Entrance Test 2026.

content.text: TG CPGET 2026 Notification has been officially released. The Telangana Common Post Graduate Entrance Test (TG CPGET) 2026 online registration started on 15 May 2026. Conducted by Kakatiya University on behalf of Telangana universities, TG CPGET is the gateway for admission into various PG and PG Diploma courses offered by Osmania University, Kakatiya University, Telangana University, and other participating universities.

The TG CPGET-2026 is a state-level entrance test for admission into Postgraduate (PG) and PG Diploma programmes offered by Osmania, Kakatiya, Telangana, Mahatma Gandhi, Palamuru, Satavahana, Veeranari Chakali Ilamma Women’s, JNTUH, and Dr. Manmohan Singh Earth Sciences Universities.
Direct Official Notification PDF: Click Here

rows: Last Date to Submit Online Application
Last Date with Late Fee of ₹500
Last Date with Late Fee of ₹2000

sections.heading: How to Apply for TG CPGET 2026

items: Complete registration and pay the fee.
Submit and take a printout of the application.

content.text: Apply Online Link Placement: Place prominently after Important Dates and in the Important Links section.

items: Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination (Bachelor’s Degree) with minimum 40% marks (pass marks sufficient for SC/ST candidates).
Eligibility criteria vary as per course and subject (detailed in the brochure).
Candidates appearing in the final year of qualifying examination are also eligible.
Qualifying Examination Marks Memo & Provisional Certificate

content.text: Qualifying in TG CPGET 2026 is followed by web-based counselling, certificate verification, and seat allotment based on rank, category, and preferences.
